summary: Full backend + frontend test pass. 19/19 backend pytest tests green covering projects, entries, stats, share-token/share-view/share-rotate/cascade-delete. Frontend Playwright verified all critical flows: dashboard, filters, search, project CRUD via row menu + detail page, status dropdown, checkbox toggle w/ strikethrough, entry CRUD w/ total_hours reflection, share dialog copy+rotate, shared read-only view (no edit controls, invalid token shows 'Link unavailable', expand time log).

issues: Console a11y warnings: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Radix Dialog needs an explicit DialogDescription or aria-describedby to silence the accessibility warning.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) to ProjectDialog, EntryDialog, ShareDialog to remove Radix a11y warnings.

MINOR CODE HYGIENE: ProjectRow.jsx has two data-testid* attributes on same element ('data-testid' for status + 'data-testid-project' for id). Consider consolidating (e.g. use one testid with id) — currently functional, tests can locate rows via the child link testid.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py load_dotenv order is correct (before reading env). Good.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} across all list/find calls — no ObjectId serialization issues.
Cascade delete of entries when project is deleted works (backend test verified).
stats.hours_this_week uses last 7 days including today (today - 6 days .. today) — matches spec.
Share token rotation correctly invalidates old token (backend test verified).

compute_total_hours is called in a loop over projects (N+1 queries). Not a bug but O(N) mongo queries per /api/projects and /api/share/{token} call. Fine at small scale; consider aggregation if project count grows.
ProjectRow: duplicate 'data-testid' key intent (adds custom data-testid-project) — HTML attribute is fine, but standard React convention would be a single canonical data-testid. Non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Created + deleted TEST_ prefixed projects/entries during backend pytest and Playwright runs. Original seed (Q1 Brand Video 5.5h, Website Redesign delivered) preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_hours_ledger.py — reusable. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_hours_ledger.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. All 19 pass in ~6s against public URL. Seed data on Mongo: 'Q1 Brand Video' + 'Website Redesign' (delivered).
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — all flows working as specified.
